name: Quantum Aegis
mapping: Post-quantum cryptography: CRYSTALS-Kyber, CRYSTALS-Dilithium, SPHINCS+, crypto agility
desc: The quantum threat is real and ticking. Every secret encrypted with RSA or ECC today is being harvested — stored by nation-states to be decrypted the day a quantum computer powerful enough arrives. That day may be 5 years away. It may be 15. The Quantum Aegis does not wait to find out. It upgrades your armor now, against weapons that don't exist yet.
analysis: NIST finalized post-quantum standards in 2024 (CRYSTALS-Kyber/ML-KEM, CRYSTALS-Dilithium/ML-DSA). Migration is underway. The genuine challenge: 'crypto agility' — building systems that can swap algorithms without redesign. Harvest-now-decrypt-later attacks are happening NOW.
question: If quantum computers arrived tomorrow, what encrypted data would be catastrophic to expose?
